# `/kick` Command
Kicks a player from the server.

<table>
  <tr>
    <th>Permission Level</th>
    <td>Game Directors</td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <th>Requires Cheats?</th>
    <td>No</td>
  </tr>
</table>

## Usage
### `/kick <name: target> <reason: message>`

## Arguments
- `name`: target
- `reason`: message
